symbols: rose window — the radiance of divine light and the cosmic order of creation
three arched portals — the Trinity and the entrance into sacred space
bell tower — the call to worship and prayer
description: A photograph of a large Romanesque stone cathedral with a prominent triangular facade featuring two rose windows and rows of blind arcades with slender columns. Three arched portal entrances span the ground level. A tall bell tower with horizontal banding rises on the left side. The building is constructed of pale stone. A cloudy sky hangs above, and an empty stone plaza stretches before the cathedral.
